description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine seq_machine_data_4, and is implemented by a call to seq_machine_data_4. Use this API routine to modify the sequence data of an existing machine in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Positive Sequence Generator Impedance Data, Negative Sequence Generator Impedance Data and Zero Sequence Generator Impedance Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = seq_machine_data_3(ibus, id, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: intgar
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying one element (defaulted data items are unchanged). (input).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of ten elements specifying (defaulted data items are unchanged). (input).

intgar.description: CZG, code indicating the units in which the zero sequence grounding impedance is specified.

realar.description: RPOS, machine positive sequence fault analysis resistance.
X”, machine positive sequence fault analysis subtransient reactance.
RNEG, machine negative sequence fault analysis resistance.
XNEG, machine negative sequence fault analysis reactance.
RZERO, machine zero sequence fault analysis resistance.
XZERO, machine zero sequence fault analysis reactance.
X’, machine positive sequence fault analysis transient reactance.
Xs, machine positive sequence fault analysis synchronous reactance.
RG, machine zero sequence grounding resistance.
XG, machine zero sequence grounding reactance.

error_codes.description: machine identifier is more than two characters.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - Grounding impedance units code indicates input in ohms but no base voltage has been specified for the bus. - Invalid grounding impedance units code. - Invalid grounding impedance units code. - Invalid positive sequence reactance value. - Negative sequence impedance is (0.0,0.0). - Zero sequence impedance is (0.0,0.0).
